plan.failureSummary: Deterministic step replayed cached click on '[data-testid=\'radio-age-25-34\']' which failed because the active survey form variation ('Set 2') does not contain this element.
observedIndicators: Deterministic execution failed at step 3 while attempting to click locator '[data-testid=\'radio-age-25-34\']'
Live failure screenshot shows the survey form in 'Set 2' state without any age radio button field
Historical runs show an alternating pass/fail pattern (flakiness score 0.89) characteristic of deterministic cache mismatches on variable form layouts
usedDeterministicMode is true and isRetryAttempt is false

remediationSteps.summary: Clear PageAi cache and retry test execution
remediationSteps.details: Clear the PageAi deterministic cache for this test and retry the test run to allow autonomous navigation to handle the current form set.

remediationSteps.summary: Update step handling for dynamic survey question sets
remediationSteps.details: If deterministic replay is required across variable form sets, update the step definitions or form structure handling to handle dynamic question fields gracefully.

plan.notes: The unstable survey web app dynamically presents different question sets (indicated by 'Set 2' on the page). The test ran in DETERMINISTIC mode using cached selectors from a prior run where age radio buttons existed. Clearing the PageAi cache and retrying allows autonomous navigation to adapt to the active form state.
